reference: I have had a severe case of influenza and now have a chest infection. It has been nine days since the onset of influenza, and I am experiencing difficulty breathing. There is a loud rattle when I exhale. Additionally, if I lie on my left side, it gets worse, so I feel it is the left side of my chest. Do I need to revisit the doctor? I have Type two diabetes and fibromyalgia, so my immune system is not strong, but I never know when I am over-worrying.
text: I have had a severe case of influenza and now I have a chest infection. It has been nine days since the onset of influenza and I have a considerable fever. There is a low rattle when I exhale. Additionally, if I lie on my left side, it gets worse, so I feel it is the left side of my chest. I have to visit the doctor. I have type 2 diabetes and cardiovascular disease, so my immune system is not strong, but I never know when I am overworked.
